commands.review_summary:
The PR strictly parses an inherited gateway service PID before gateway startup overwrites the env var, threads it into stale gateway PID cleanup, and adds parser plus reparent-regression tests.

PR surface: Source +95, Tests +104. Total +199 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a high-confidence reproduction path from source and supplied real-host proof: launchd-managed gateway, Codex 0.135 zsh shell snapshot sourcing a legacy `.zshrc` auto-start block, a reparented child with `process.ppid === 1`, and inherited `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_SERVICE_PID` matching the victim. I did not rerun the live host scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair remains; the next action is maintainer acceptance of the service-mode cleanup invariant and normal merge gating.
